Crown Cascade

Make a Splash Like Royalty

Price
$319
Status
Available Now
Category
Water Slide
Duration
Private parties: up to 6 hrs · Events: up to 4 hrs
Use type
Wet-use

Crown Cascade is designed to bring water-slide excitement to warm-weather events. It is a great option for summer birthdays, backyard parties, and splash-ready celebrations.

Colourful water slide for splash-ready summer fun.

Features

  • Water slide
  • Colourful design
  • Splash-ready fun
  • Great summer attraction

Best For

  • Summer birthdays
  • Backyard parties
  • Hot-weather events
  • Water fun

Setup Notes

  • Clear level setup area required
  • Power access required
  • Water source required
  • Safe drainage area required
  • Adult supervision required at all times

Check availability for Crown Cascade
